summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of UX/UI overhaul for Compass AI governance platform. All new features tested successfully: Landing page, Construction Assessment, Sectors page, Logo integration, and Navigation updates.
passed_tests: Landing Page (/welcome): Hero section with 'AI Governance Strategies & Oversight' title displays correctly
Landing Page: Trust badges (ISO 42001, EU AI Act, NIST RMF, SOC 2) visible and properly styled
Landing Page: New compass-logo.png displays in navigation header
Landing Page: CTAs 'Assess Readiness' and 'Book a Debrief' buttons visible and clickable
Landing Page: Features section with 4 capability cards (Risk Classification, Evidence Architecture, Control Design, Oversight Workflows)
Landing Page: Sector-Specific Governance section with 6 sector cards (Construction, Healthcare, Finance, Public Sector, Education, SaaS)
Landing Page: Construction featured card with 'Take Assessment' and 'Learn More' buttons
Landing Page: Navigation to /construction-assessment works from 'Take Assessment' button
Construction Assessment (/construction-assessment): Page loads with 8-question assessment flow
Construction Assessment: Progress bar showing 'Question X of 8' and percentage complete
Construction Assessment: Question 1 (checkbox) - Environment selection with 5 options
Construction Assessment: Question 2 (checkbox) - Asset tracking with 5 options
Construction Assessment: Questions 3-8 (radio) - Various governance questions
Construction Assessment: Navigation buttons (Previous/Next/View Results) work correctly
Construction Assessment: Results page shows Governance Score, Readiness Level, Risk Factors, and Strengths
Construction Assessment: CTAs on results (Run Full Assessment, Book a Debrief, Retake Assessment)
Sectors Page (/sectors): 'Industry Solutions' title with subtitle
Sectors Page: Featured badge on Construction card
Sectors Page: Construction full description with 'What you get' section
Sectors Page: 4 feature tags (Multi-site access, Field data quality, Safety AI, Evidence trails)
Sectors Page: Other sectors (Healthcare, Finance, SaaS/Technology, Public Sector, Education) displayed
Sectors Page: 'Assess Readiness', 'Construction Assessment', 'Book a Debrief' buttons
Login Page (/login): New compass-logo.png displays above 'Compass AI' title
Login Page: Login/Register tabs with proper form fields
Sidebar Navigation: 'Industries' link in main nav section
Sidebar Navigation: 'Construction' under AI TOOLS section with HardHat icon
Onboarding Page (/onboarding): Logo displays in header
Onboarding Form: Sector dropdown contains 'Construction' option (verified: SaaS, Healthcare, Education, Public, Finance, Construction, Other)
Design System: Playfair Display font applied to headings (font-heading class)
Design System: Regulatory blue primary color (HSL 220, 80%, 55%)
Design System: Construction amber gradient theme (from-amber-500 to-orange-600)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UX/UI overhaul completed and verified. New pages: /welcome (public landing), /construction-assessment (8-question assessment), /sectors (industry solutions). Logo updated across Login, Sidebar, Onboarding, and Landing pages. Navigation includes 'Industries' in main nav and 'Construction' under AI TOOLS. Design system uses Playfair Display font, regulatory blue colors, and construction amber theme.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
